summary: Iteration 25: Dynamic FAQ/Help System Testing Complete. All 16 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend verified: Client help page shows 7 topics in accordion UI with expand/collapse, contact section with configurable support email (ajuda@itoke.app). Admin FAQ tab shows CRUD form with title, content, icon picker, order, and support email configuration. All features working as expected.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/help-topics - Returns all topics sorted by order (7 topics)
Backend: GET /api/help-settings - Returns support email config
Backend: GET /api/admin/help-topics - Admin only, returns all topics
Backend: POST /api/admin/help-topics - Create new help topic with validation
Backend: PUT /api/admin/help-topics/{topic_id} - Update existing topic
Backend: DELETE /api/admin/help-topics/{topic_id} - Delete a topic
Backend: GET /api/admin/help-settings - Admin gets support email config
Backend: PUT /api/admin/help-settings - Admin updates support email
Backend: Admin endpoints require admin role (403 for clients)
Backend: Validation - title and content required for create
Backend: 404 for nonexistent topic on update/delete
Backend: 6 default topics seeded on startup with correct icons
Frontend Client: Help page loads with 'Central de Ajuda' header
Frontend Client: 7 help topics displayed in accordion cards
Frontend Client: Topics expand/collapse on click
Frontend Client: Contact section with 'Ainda precisa de ajuda?' text
Frontend Client: Support email displayed (ajuda@itoke.app)
Frontend Client: 'Enviar E-mail' button present
Frontend Admin: FAQ tab accessible (6th tab)
Frontend Admin: 'Gestao de Ajuda (FAQ)' section title
Frontend Admin: E-mail de Suporte config with input and Salvar button
Frontend Admin: '+ Novo Topico' button present
Frontend Admin: 7 FAQ items listed with icons, titles, order numbers
Frontend Admin: Edit (pencil) and Delete (trash) buttons on each item
critical_code_review_comments: help.tsx: Properly fetches topics and settings from API on mount
help.tsx: Accordion expand/collapse implemented with expandedId state
help.tsx: Contact section uses configurable supportEmail from API
dashboard.tsx: FAQ tab properly integrated with fetchFaqTopics callback
dashboard.tsx: CRUD handlers (handleSaveFaqTopic, handleEditFaq, handleDeleteFaq) working
server.py: Help topics endpoints properly exclude _id from responses
server.py: Startup seed creates 6 default topics if collection empty
seed_data_creation: 6 default help topics seeded automatically on startup + 1 admin-created topic = 7 total
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 25 complete. Dynamic FAQ/Help system fully tested. Backend: All CRUD endpoints for help topics working, admin-only access enforced, validation working. Frontend Client: Help page at /help tab shows accordion list of topics from API, contact section with configurable email. Frontend Admin: FAQ tab (6th tab) shows support email config, '+ Novo Topico' button, list of topics with edit/delete actions. Support email currently set to 'ajuda@itoke.app'. 7 topics exist (6 seeded + 1 admin-created).

features_verified.admin_faq_topic_list: WORKING - Shows all topics with actions
